query.text:
declare @ma_nt0 varchar(3), @key nvarchar(1000), @f nvarchar(1000), @ItemCount int, @q nvarchar(1000) select top 0 so_ct, ngay_ct, stt_rec, t_tt_nt, t_tt_qd as da_tt_nt, t_tt_nt as cl_nt, ma_nt, t_tt, tk, dien_giai into #res from cttt20 where 1 = 0
set @key = '((''' + replace(@ma_dvcs, '''', '''''') + ''' = '''' and ma_dvcs = '@@unit') or (ma_dvcs = ''' + replace(@ma_dvcs, '''', '''''') + '''))' set @key = @key + ' and ma_kh = ''' + replace(@ma_kh, '''', '''''') + '''' set @key = @key + ' and ngay_ct <= ''' + convert(char(8), @ngay_lct, 112) + ''' and loai_tt = 0' set @key = @key + ' and (tat_toan = 0 or (stt_rec in (select stt_rec_tt from cttt20 where stt_rec_pb = ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + ''')))'
set @f = 'so_ct, ngay_ct, stt_rec, t_tt_nt, t_tt_qd as da_tt_nt' set @f = @f + ', case when ma_nt = '''' then t_tt else t_tt_nt end - t_tt_qd as cl_nt, ma_nt, t_tt, tk, dien_giai' &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; exec FastBusiness$App$Payment$Finding 'cttt20', '#res', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @key, 'so_ct + stt_rec', @f, '', 'so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ItemCount output, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
select top 0 tt_qd, stt_rec_tt into #tt from cttt20 where 1 = 0 set @q = 'insert into #tt select sum(tt_qd) as tt_qd, stt_rec_tt from cttt20 where stt_rec_pb = ''' + replace(@stt_rec, '''', '''''') + ''' group by stt_rec_tt' exec sp_executesql @q update #res set da_tt_nt = da_tt_nt - #tt.tt_qd, cl_nt = cl_nt + #tt.tt_qd from #tt where stt_rec = #tt.stt_rec_tt
select @ma_nt0 = val from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' update #res set t_tt_nt = t_tt, ma_nt = @ma_nt0 where ma_nt = ''
select @ItemCount select * from #res order by so_ct, stt_rec
